markdown:
#  Unlink Your DocuSign® Account from a Procore Project 
##  Background 
If you have used your DocuSign® account to initiate a signature from the Procore web application, your DocuSign® account becomes linked to the project so data can be synchronized between the applications. Should a need to unlink your DocuSign® account from Procore arise, use the steps below.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on one of the supported Project Tools. See [Which Procore project tools support the DocuSign® integration?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-project-tools-support-the-docusign-integration)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To request signatures using the Procore + DocuSign® integration, you must have an active DocuSign® account. For details, see [Do I need a DocuSign© account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account) and [How do I get a DocuSign® account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)


##  Prerequisites 
  * Your Procore Administrator must enable DocuSign® at the company level. See [Enable the DocuSign® Integration on Your Company's Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/enable-the-docusign-integration-on-your-companys-procore-account).
  * A user with 'Admin' permission on the project's Admin tool must enable the integration on the project. See [Enable or Disable the DocuSign® Integration on a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-docusign-integration-on-a-procore-project).
  * Your DocuSign® account must be linked to a Procore project. See [Link Your DocuSign® Account from a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/docusign/tutorials/link-your-docusign-account-to-a-procore-project).
  * You must be in a project to view the option to unlink your DocuSign® Account from Procore.


##  Steps 
To unlink your DocuSign® account from a Procore project, complete these steps:
  * Step 1: Unlink Your DocuSign® Account from a Procore Project
  * Step 2: Delete Your Linked Email Address from the DocuSign® Login Page


### Step 1: Unlink Your DocuSign® Account from Procore
  1. Navigate to the project's **Home** page.
  2. Click the avatar in the top right corner the Procore web application and click **My Profile Settings**.
  3. Under the **Personal** tab, scroll to the bottom of the page.
  4. Next to **Link DocuSign® Account** , click the RED 'x' next to the word **Synced**.   
  
![Docusign Unlink Synced Account](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/99a853da7b3e301a7005cc349663d73e/ae75303deaab9e3b97099bc4b1e7d3f7/docusign-unlink-synced-account.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Click **Update**.
  6. Click **OK** when the popup message appears to confirm that you want to delete the link between your DocuSign® account and Procore.


### Step 2: Remove Saved Passwords from the DocuSign® Login Page
#####  Tip
Be sure to make note of your password before completing the steps below so you won't need to reset your password the next time you log into DocuSign®. After you make note of your password, use the steps below to remove your saved DocuSign® password from your web browser's saved password list. This will ensure that anyone who uses your computer (and possibly others on the Internet) cannot gain access to your DocuSign® data.
  1. Navigate to the DocuSign® Logout page in your web browser: [https://account.DocuSign®.com/logout](https://account.docusign.com/logout)  
 _Notes_ :
     * This action will log you out of DocuSign®.* If the email address field is blank on the DocuSign® Login page, you have successfully deleted your linked email address.
  2. If your email address continues to appear in the DocuSign® Login page, remove your saved password from your web browser's saved password list:  
_Note_ : This protects your data from anyone who uses your computer.
     * **Google Chrome**
       * Click your avatar in Chrome and choose **Passwords**.
       * Under **Saved Passwords** , look for **account.DocuSign®.com**.* Click the vertical ellipsis (⋮) and choose **Remove**.
     * **Mozilla Firefox**
       * Click the email address field and choose **View Saved Logins** from the drop-down menu.
       * For **account.DocuSign®.com** login, click **Delete**.
       * Click **Delete** again when prompted that the action cannot be undone.
     * **Microsoft Internet Explorer 11**
       * Choose **Tools** > **Internet Options**.
       * Click **Content**.
       * Under **AutoComplete** , click **Settings**.
       * Click **Manage Passwords**.
       * Click the **Web Credentials Manager**.
       * Click the drop-down arrow next to **account.DocuSign®.com.**
       * Click **Remove**.
     * **Safari for Mac OS X**
       * Choose **Safari** > **Preferences**.
       * Click **AutoFill**.
       * Next to **User Names and Passwords** , click **Edit**.
       * Highlight the **account.DocuSign®.com** entry in the Website list.
       * Click **Remove**.
  3. Once you have cleared the saved account passwords, copy and paste this address into the URL: [https://account.DocuSign®.com/logout](https://account.docusign.com/logout). Your login information should no longer appear in the DocuSign® Logout page.


## See Also
  * [Link your DocuSign® account to a Procore project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/docusign/tutorials/link-your-docusign-account-to-a-procore-project)
  * [How do I get a DocuSign® account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)
  * [Sign a Procore Document with DocuSign®](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/docusign/tutorials/sign-a-procore-document-with-docusign)
title: Unlink Your DocuSign® Account from a Procore Project
description: How to unlink your DocuSign® account from a Procore project
